subject: CIR.NO.356 - An interactive session on Real games. Real friends. Real joy. REAL HAPPINESS.

          Scheme No. 54, A B Road, INDORE (MP) 452010

                    CBSE School No. : 50056,   CBSE Affiliation No.1030023
                  E-mail: sai@sathyasaiindore.com <sai@sathyasaiindore.com>
     Ph: 0731-25530
*CIR.NO.SSSVV/2025-26/356
     Date: 5th February 2026*

Dear Parent

Sai Ram!

*Real games. Real friends. Real joy. REAL HAPPINESS!

This is my way to LIFE!!*

An interactive session ?Unplug to Bloom? was conducted for the children of
classes III-VIII to sensitise children regarding the mindful screen usage.
The session highlighted the physical, psychological and emotional effects
of excessive screen time. It was brought to the fore that healthy digital
habits would lead to better sleep, improved concentration and renewed
energy A detox challenge was introduced to help children gradually
disconnect from screens.



Through an engaging role play, the teachers vividly highlighted the growing
dependence on mobile phones and its impact on daily life. The children were
motivated to practise digital sunset, regular exercise and outdoor
activities.



In her address Principal, Dr. Anju Chopra cautioned the children against
unwarranted screen dependence that leads to screen fatigue. She reminded
the children that how fortunate we are in India to enjoy outdoor play, a
luxury in many parts of the world and further stressed that the school
offers 24 sports activities, games under the vigilance of trained coaches
and the children must make the most of the sprawling grounds of the
school.



The children pledged to refrain from online gaming and embrace a balanced,
active lifestyle. The session effectively reinforced the message: ?Use
screens wisely?do not let screens use us.?

With Best Regards





Dr. Anju Chopra

Principal

Email ? *principal@sathyasaiindore.com <principal@sathyasaiindore.com>*
